emr.walworkspace.CfnAbout: A WAL workspace is a logical container of write-ahead logs (WALs). All WALs in Amazon EMR WAL are encapsulated by a WAL workspace.

emr.walworkspace.Tags.Description: You can add tags when you create a new workspace. You can add, remove, or list tags from an active workspace, but you can't update tags. Instead, remove the tag and add a new one. For more information, see see [Tag your Amazon EMR WAL workspaces](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/emr/latest/ReleaseGuide/emr-hbase-wal.html#emr-hbase-wal-tagging).

emr.walworkspace.WALWorkspaceName.Description: The name of the WAL workspace.
